data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a customer requests an exception through the proper channel. However, the evidence provided does not include specific API reads or outcomes that confirm whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a clear, actionable failure report. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not provide concrete data to assess the outcome of this scenario, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of the outcome of the exception request scenario.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the outcome of the exception request.
